Request a demo

IoT Devices

Every sensor. One security picture.

The panic button pressed in the lobby. The UPS that just lost power. The perimeter sensor that triggered at 3am. SYAG connects every IoT device in your facility to the same operational picture — so nothing is missed.

What IoT integration looks like in your facility

Panic button pressed

A guard presses their panic button. Within 3 seconds, an incident is created, the on-duty supervisor receives a push notification, and the two nearest guards are notified to respond. No radio call required.

UPS power failure

The UPS in the server room loses mains power. SYAG detects the device event, creates a maintenance incident, and notifies the facility manager. Response time: under 60 seconds.

Perimeter sensor triggered

A fence vibration sensor activates at the east boundary. SYAG's Flow rule checks the time (02:00) and creates a high-priority security incident. The camera covering that zone is automatically pulled up in the Operations Center.

Environmental sensor alert

A smoke sensor in the basement car park triggers. SYAG creates an emergency incident, notifies the guard team, and triggers the evacuation protocol flow.

Connect your devices in minutes

SYAG uses a system-managed device type catalog. Facility admins register device instances by selecting from a catalog of known types — no custom event schema configuration required.

Category Examples
Personal safety Guard panic buttons, resident emergency buttons
Power & utilities UPS monitors, generator sensors
Environmental Smoke detectors, flood sensors, temperature alarms
Access control Door contact sensors, gate loop detectors
Perimeter Fence vibration sensors, beam break detectors
Vehicle ANPR triggers, parking sensors

Always know which devices are online

  • Live device health dashboard: online / offline / battery low / last seen
  • Automatic alert when a device goes offline unexpectedly
  • Battery level monitoring for wireless devices
  • Device event history: full log of all events from every device

Connects with

Flow Automation Incident Management Camera & VMS
